name: Septerna, Inc.
summary: Septerna, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing oral small molecule therapeutics targeting G protein-coupled receptors (GPCRs). The company utilizes its proprietary Native Complex Platform to develop product candidates including SEP-479 and SEP-631. Septerna has a partnership with Novo Nordisk A/S to develop oral small molecule therapies for metabolic-related diseases targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors for obesity, type 2 diabetes, and related conditions.

products.name: SEP-479
products.description: Oral small molecule product candidate targeting GPCRs, in development as part of Septerna's pipeline.

products.name: SEP-631
products.description: Oral small molecule product candidate targeting GPCRs, in development as part of Septerna's pipeline.

products.name: Native Complex Platform
products.description: Proprietary drug discovery platform used to identify and develop oral small molecule GPCR-targeted therapeutics.

partnerships.description: Partnership to develop oral small molecule therapies targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors for metabolic diseases; includes potential milestone and royalty payments.
